decision: keep default prompt-suite-safe W4 multi-row site mask

commands.suite: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIPENGINE_W4_MULTI_ROW_PACK8_SITES=all HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 1 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-w4-all-sites-retune-d32-20260613 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-w4-all-sites-retune-d32-20260613.json
commands.profile: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); rm -rf /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-w4-all-sites-verify-rocprof-20260613; env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIPENGINE_W4_MULTI_ROW_PACK8_SITES=all HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 2400 python3 scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --region verify_pass --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-w4-all-sites-verify-rocprof-20260613 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-b1-w4-all-sites-verify-rocprof-20260613.json --top 80

decision_reason: The full D32 suite was exact and slightly positive, but the focused quicksort verifier profile showed no launch-count/path movement and regressed both kernel and host marker time. Treat the suite delta as run variance and keep the default safe W4 site mask.
